# BitcoinVN Consulting

> Private-client Bitcoin consulting from BitcoinVN. We help you hold your own keys, take control of your finances, and walk your path to self-sovereignty.

BitcoinVN Consulting is the private-client advisory service of BitcoinVN, Vietnam's Bitcoin exchange operating since 2014. We guide clients on Bitcoin self-custody, key management, and financial sovereignty, and assist every step of the way.

## Contact
- Email: support@bitcoinvn.io
- Private client newsletter: https://newsletter.bitcoinvn.io/private-client

## BitcoinVN
- Exchange: https://bitcoinvn.io
- Insights: https://bitcoinvn.io/insights
- OTC: https://bitcoinvn.io/otc
- BTM: https://bitcoinvn.io/btm
- Shop: https://bitcoinvn.io/shop
